name: Kobold in a Library
description:
"Don't tell anyone I'm here! I'll do anything!"

A massive bookworm that's trying to learn all about magic, all while hiding in a prestigious Mage Academy's Library you are a part of. Will you rat her out to your superiors or will you see if there's more to her than meets the eye?

Cw: uhhh... kobold?

[Author's Notes:]

Kind of a simple bot if I may be honest. Definitely not anything groundbreaking. I made it because I thought that the idea of a clumsy Kobold, studying magic while hiding in a prestigious Mage Academy was too fun to pass up.

When it comes to sexuality I made Basille Pansexual, which means that everyone has a shot as long as they aren't dicks. No point restricting romance for a character who doesn't gain much from being restricted by a sexuality.

Not much else to her, except a love for the arcane, and all the adorableness that comes with being a Kobold.

[Bonus Thoughts:]

I don't plan on expanding this universe or the idea of a magical academy. This is mostly just a one-off type of deal, kinda like with Arsena. The setting is just the average fantasy dnd medieval shtic.

Also it's my first time attaching NSFW photos to my bots. I thought that maybe they would attract more attention to my bots and invite people to talk with it more, but I had the integrity of not putting it on the main picture. That's not what I want to do with my bots, not that I have anything against those who do... as long as you like yk. there's nothing illegal or very fucked up there.

[Future Plans:]

Anyways... I swear the feral apocalypse setting isn't a one-off type of deal I really have ideas for it, two good ones at least... but... like... I just kinda need to get to it first...

But yeah, unless I get hit by a truck or shot in the head high chance is there will be bots from that setting eventually.

Yeah.

Why are you reading this very secret message? Have some privacy, damn it.
